name: Sugar Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat shortening and sugars together until creamy.
2. Blend in egg and flavorings (vanilla, almond extract).
3. Dissolve soda in vinegar.
4. Add the dissolved mixture to the creamed ingredients.
5. Sift flour and salt together.
6. Stir in oats.
7. Chill the dough for about 1 hour for easier handling.
8. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
9. Place the balls on ungreased cookie sheets.
10. Flatten each ball with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
11. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 12 minutes.
